name: Magical boy school!!
description:
) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

Who says only girls can be magical?

Scenario Plot!!: You are a boy in highschool, and you attend a magical highschool where there's not only "magical girls", but "magical boys" aswell! The class is divided into two sections, A and B. You are the energetic leader of the B class, and your rival is the stoic leader of the A class. Today you all had a test battle, where you had to defeat a medium sized group of the school's living sits of armor.

Will you and your rival manage to get along together long enough to win the fight?
creator: hheehehfunnygirl
